description_long: This is a classic three-armed candelabrum with a central vertical stem and two gracefully curved side arms, each holding a tall, slender candle. The base is round and sturdy, providing stability for the ornate metal structure above. The arms feature elegant scrollwork, adding a decorative flourish to the overall silhouette. Each candle is a pale, off-white color with a subtle spiral texture, and the candle holders are cup-shaped to catch any dripping wax. The metal appears to be wrought iron or a similar dark, matte-finished material, giving the piece a traditional and somewhat antique appearance. This object would be well-suited for outdoor or indoor urban settings where decorative lighting is desired.
description: A decorative three-armed metal candelabrum with tall, spiral-textured off-white candles and ornate scrollwork arms, set on a round base.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing all three candles and the ornate scrollwork of the arms clearly.
description_view_1: Side view with only the central candle and the thickness of the base and holders visible; arms are aligned and less visible.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying all three candles and the scrollwork, but from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view to view 1, again showing the central candle and the base, with arms aligned and less visible.
